name: property managers handling 10-50 units tool
description: For property managers handling 10-50 units, inefficient tenant move-in/out processes cause delays in tenant transitions. We automate checklist generation instead of manual checklists and paper work orders.
features: work order creation for building superintendent

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual checklists and paper work orders
must_have_features: work order creation for building superintendent
